name: Blackbeans Saifun
recipeIngredient: 1 can black beans (Hain brand or 12 oz. homemade with cooking juices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the saifun noodles for less than 5 minutes until just tender.
2. Heat the can of black beans in a separate pan or container.
3. In another bowl, blend together tamari, balsamic vinegar, sucanat, hot mustard powder, and ginger curry to create a sauce-like consistency.
4. Mix the blended ingredients with the heated black beans.
5. Serve the saifun noodles mixed with 50/50 proportion of cooked saifun and black bean mixture.
6. Serves two.
